items.briefing:
With the Socceroos in action, cyber-criminals are expected to exploit fan excitement through fake streaming sites, ticket scams, and phishing emails around match times — including early morning kickoffs when people are tired and less cautious. Separately, Asia-Pacific is experiencing the highest rates of identity fraud globally, meaning Australians are at elevated risk of having their personal details stolen and misused.

A growing phishing technique is also automatically adjusting its appearance based on your device and operating system, making fake pages look more convincing. **Practical tip:** If you're searching for Socceroos streams tonight, only use official, known platforms — avoid clicking links shared via social media or messaging apps.

featured.title: Why SMS authentication is exposing mortgage lenders to avoidable risk
featured.quote: SMS authentication vulnerabilities expose Australian mortgage lenders to high-value fraud and data breaches.
